//: Class descriptors for libpdc.so. The classes that matter for the
U4025QW PDC path are Tps6598xISP + the TPS6598X_API it embeds at
offset 8. The decomp confirms IS-A composition: Tps6598xISP::*
methods cast &this->i2c_target (which is this+8) to TPS6598X_API*
IIC_INTF mirrors the libdisplay.so.json descriptor — same abstract
transport. ModuleMessage is opaque (we just need pointer typing).

classes.name: ModuleMessage
classes.//: Logger/progress sink, opaque. Constructor in set_message_handler
with three function-pointer args (info_cb, send_cb, update_cb),
so the struct is at least 0x18 (3 pointers).

classes.name: IIC_INTF
classes.//: Same descriptor as libdisplay.so.json. Adds slot 0x128 (write_seq)

0x20.name: open_pid
0x20.//: (IIC_INTF*, u16 vid, u16 pid, u32 idx, u8 speed)

0x58.name: check_image
0x58.//: (IIC_INTF*, u8* src, u32 size, u32* blocks, u32* blksize, u32* sigsize) -> u8

0x68.name: get_block_data
0x68.//: (IIC_INTF*, u32 src_idx, u32 count, u8* out) -> u8

0xf0.name: read_seq
0xf0.//: (IIC_INTF*, u8 slave, u8 reg, u8 count, u8* out) -> u8 — read N i2c bytes

0x120.name: write_byte
0x120.//: (IIC_INTF*, u8 slave, u8 reg, u8 val) -> u8 — write single byte

0x128.name: write_seq
0x128.//: (IIC_INTF*, u8 slave, u8 reg, u8 count, u8* buf) -> u8 — write N bytes (count includes leading length prefix in TPS6598x usage)

classes.name: TPS6598X_API
classes.//: Per-chip i2c access wrapper for TPS6598x. Embedded at offset 8
fourCC_Command — the 4CC command being the TPS6598x firmware
WriteIICRegister wraps each call as a [length=4][4 data bytes]
5-byte i2c write at the target register (8 for cmd, 9 for data).
Layout: 4 config bytes at the front + 4 bytes padding + IIC_INTF*
at offset 8. Size 0x10. (When embedded in Tps6598xISP at +8, this
places the iic pointer at Tps6598xISP+0x10, matching the decomp.)

fields.name: i2c_target
fields.//: 8-bit slave address. U4025QW PDC chip = 0x42.

fields.name: chunk_size
fields.//: Per-write chunk size in bytes. Constructor sets 0x20 if PD_CHIP==1
else 0x40; also forced 0x20 by set_limited_write_size. Used as
the increment in RegionUpdate82's per-chunk loop.

fields.name: remove_extra_delay
fields.//: Controls whether fourCC_Command + WriteIICRegister insert extra
nanosleep delays between phases. When 0 (default), three delay
blocks fire per fourCC call (_DAT_00293fe0 / _DAT_00293ff0 /
_DAT_00294000) — these are the pre-cmd, mid, and post-cmd sleeps.

fields.name: iic
fields.//: Transport (proves embedded at +8: WriteIICRegister reads
*(long **)(this + 8) for the vtable dispatch).

classes.name: Tps6598xISP
classes.//: TI TPS6598x PD controller ISP driver. Holds an embedded
TPS6598X_API at offset 8 (constructor cast pattern proves it:

fields.name: api
fields.//: Embedded — Tps6598xISP IS-A wrapper around TPS6598X_API.
Methods like FWUpdate82 / RegionUpdate82 reach the API via
the cast (TPS6598X_API*)&this->i2c_target.

fields.name: log
fields.//: Logger/progress sink — NULL means logging disabled.

fields.name: i2c_speed
fields.//: 1..7. Passed to IIC_INTF::open.

fields.name: region0_addr
fields.//: First arg to set_region_addr — base address of region 0 in
the TPS6598x's flash. RegionUpdate82 uses (&region0_addr)[regnum]
to pick between region 0 and 1.

fields.name: region1_addr
fields.//: Base address of region 1. Same set_region_addr call.

fields.name: flags
fields.//: Bitfield. Bits seen so far:
bit 4 (0x10) = set_boot_check value
bit 5 (0x20) = has_device_path (set by set_device_path)
bit 1 (0x02) = ?  (consumed by check_start retry logic)

fields.name: fw_data_begin
fields.//: std::vector<unsigned char> holding the loaded firmware blob.
begin pointer. load() populates from input bytes.

fields.name: device_path_data
fields.//: std::string SSO data pointer. Initialized to point at this+0x60.

fields.name: stage
fields.//: IspStage of the last update_progress call. 0=initial, 1=preprobe,
2/3/4=region0 stages, 5/6/7=region1 stages, 8=Completed, 9=FAIL.

fields.name: progress_percent
fields.//: 0..100 or -1 for fail.

fields.name: fw_region_data
fields.//: Region-specific firmware data pointer. load() sets to __dest
(allocated buffer). RegionUpdate82 reads chunks from
fw_region_data + offset for each FLwd write.

fields.name: fw_region_size
fields.//: Region-specific firmware byte count. RegionUpdate82 chunks it
into fw_region_size/chunk_size FLwd writes plus a tail.

fields.name: fw_checksum
fields.//: Sum of firmware bytes computed during load(). Used by
RegionUpdate82's verify pass.

fields.name: owned_log
fields.//: Owned ModuleMessage if set_message_handler was called with NULL.

fields.name: using_verify_command_only
fields.//: If true, skip the readback-verify VerifyFW() and rely solely on
the chip's FLvy 4CC verify command.

0x18.name: start
0x18.//: (Tps6598xISP*) -> ulong; entry. Dispatches via vt to check_start(this,0).

0x20.name: check_start
0x20.//: (Tps6598xISP*, bool same_version) -> u32. Validates device+fw then calls isp() or skips.
